name: Marseille (France)

colors.symbolism: the silver field of the city's arms
the cross of the city's arms

description: A white field bearing a blue Greek cross extending to the edges, taken directly from the city's medieval coat of arms.
history: Marseille's blue cross on white (or 'argent, a cross azure') is one of the oldest civic emblems in France, in continuous use since the 13th century.

features.symbolism: the historic arms of the city of Marseille, attested since the 13th century
